trending_videos.title: Supergirl | Tickets on Sale Now
trending_videos.description:
Get tickets now and tag who you're bringing to see #Supergirl - only in theaters and IMAX June 26.

“Supergirl,” DC Studios’ newest feature film to hit the big screen, will be in theaters worldwide this summer from Warner Bros. Pictures, starring Milly Alcock in the dual role of Supergirl/Kara Zor-El. Craig Gillespie directs the film from a screenplay by Ana Nogueira.

When an unexpected and ruthless adversary strikes too close to home, Kara Zor-El, aka Supergirl, reluctantly joins forces with an unlikely companion on an epic, interstellar journey of vengeance and justice.

Alcock stars alongside Matthias Schoenaerts, Eve Ridley, David Krumholtz, Emily Beecham, and Jason Momoa.

DC Studios heads Peter Safran and James Gunn are producing the film, which is based on characters from DC, Supergirl based on characters created by Jerry Siegel and Joe Shuster. The film is executive produced by Nigel Gostelow, Chantal Nong Vo and Lars P. Winther. Behind the camera, Gillespie is joined by direc

trending_videos.title: State of Play | June 2, 2026 [English]
trending_videos.description:
State of Play returns Tuesday, June 2 with more than 60 minutes of updates, announcements, and gameplay reveals from top studios around the world. 

To kick things off, you’ll get a closer look at Marvel’s Wolverine. Insomniac Games will share more from its upcoming third-person action-adventure game showing off Logan’s brutal and relentless combat along with some new details. This all-new take on the comic book legend launches on PS5 September 15.

Watch the State of Play broadcast live Tuesday, June 2 at 2:00pm PT / 5:00pm ET / 11:00pm CEST | June 3 at 6:00am JST on YouTube and Twitch. The broadcast will be in English, with Japanese subtitles also available. We hope to see you then!

Regarding co-streaming and video-on-demand (VOD)

trending_videos.title: By Any Means | Official Trailer (2026 Movie) – Yahya Abdul-Mateen II, Mark Wahlberg
trending_videos.description:
When the system is broken, break the rules By Any Means. Watch the trailer for #ByAnyMeansMovie, only in theatres this September.

Inspired by a true story, a young Black FBI agent (Yahya Abdul-Mateen II) is sent into 1960s Mississippi to investigate a wave of brutal killings targeting civil rights leaders. Forced to work alongside notorious mafia hitman Greg Scarpa (Mark Wahlberg), he finds himself pulled into a deadly hunt where justice and vengeance begin to blur.
When the system is broken, two men divided by everything agree on one thing: the law has limits. They don’t.

movie_trailers.description: Movie trailers are prominently featured in the trending videos, indicating a strong interest in upcoming films.
movie_trailers.insight: 5 out of 10 trending videos are movie trailers, suggesting a high engagement with upcoming film releases.
movie_trailers.recommendation: Content creators should consider producing more movie-related content, such as reviews or behind-the-scenes footage, to capitalize on this interest.

gaming.description: Gaming content remains popular, with videos related to gaming events and challenges trending.
gaming.insight: 2 out of 10 trending videos are gaming-related ('State of Play', 'Unstable SMP: Civil War FINALE').
gaming.recommendation: Gaming channels should focus on creating content around major gaming events and unique in-game challenges to engage viewers.

music.description: Music content, particularly official music videos, continues to draw significant viewership.
music.insight: 1 video ('IShowSpeed - World Cup') out of 10 is a music video, highlighting ongoing interest in music content.
music.recommendation: Musicians and content creators should explore collaborations and timely releases, aligning with popular events (e.g., World Cup) to maximize reach.

large_brands.description: Established brands and movie studios are consistently represented in trending content.
large_brands.insight: Channels like DC, PlayStation, and Paramount Pictures each have trending videos, indicating the power of established brands to draw audiences.
large_brands.recommendation: Emerging creators should consider partnerships with established brands to gain visibility.

independent_creators.description: Independent creators can also make an impact, as seen with channels like IShowSpeed.
independent_creators.insight: IShowSpeed, a popular independent creator, has a trending video, showcasing the potential for individual success.
independent_creators.recommendation: Independent creators should leverage trending topics and unique content styles to compete with larger brands.

cross-promotion.description: Cross-promotional opportunities exist between different types of content, such as gaming and music.
cross-promotion.insight: Creators like IShowSpeed successfully blend gaming and music, indicating a market for hybrid content.
cross-promotion.recommendation: Creators should explore cross-genre content, such as combining gaming with music or movies, to attract diverse audiences.

emerging technologies.description: There is potential for innovative content formats using new technologies.
emerging technologies.insight: The presence of interactive and challenge-based content (e.g., 'I Added A DTI SQUISHY TOWER' on ROBLOX) suggests a growing interest in interactive media.
emerging technologies.recommendation: Content creators should experiment with new technologies and platforms (like VR or interactive content) to engage tech-savvy audiences.

analysis.note: Transcript analysis is more detailed, metadata analysis provides broader trends
